errors.evidence: Agent used web_search tool to retrieve paper instead of inspect_file_as_text to process PDF content.
errors.description: The agent failed to use the inspect_file_as_text tool to extract data from the PDF paper, instead relying solely on web_search results which may not contain the exact calculation.
errors.impact: Risk of incorrect data extraction due to reliance on secondary sources instead of direct PDF analysis.

errors.evidence: Agent accepted web_search result without verifying through inspect_file_as_text.
errors.description: The agent did not cross-validate the web_search result with the actual paper content via inspect_file_as_text, leading to potential Poor Information Retrieval.
errors.impact: Increased risk of answer inaccuracy due to unverified source.

scores.reliability_reasoning: Relies on external web search without PDF verification, risking outdated or incorrect data.
scores.security_reasoning: No evidence of API misuse; tools used within defined parameters.
scores.instruction_adherence_reasoning: Failed to follow planned steps using inspect_file_as_text, deviated from task orchestration.
scores.plan_opt_reasoning: Suboptimal tool selection led to potential data verification gaps.
